Documentation.Summary: Draws an arc (line). Angles are clockwise, 0 is north.

Params.angle: The center of the arc, in degrees
Params.angleSize: The size of the arc, in degrees

Documentation.Summary: Draws a pie. Angles are clockwise, 0 is north.

Params.angle: The center of the pie, in degrees
Params.angleSize: The size of the pie, in degrees

Documentation.Summary: Adds required ellipses to a string if it doesn't fit within the width
Set the pen and font style from a style
Draw a rectangle using the background of a style
Load an image from a file on disk, specifically from "core/tools/images".
Create a pixmap from a bitmap
Create a pixmap from a texture.
Fill the pixel map with given color.
Duplicate a sub-rectangle of the image at re-draw it at given coordinates.

Params.x: Position to re-draw the duplicated image at on the X axis, from the left edge.
Params.y: Position to re-draw the duplicated image at on the Y axis, from the top edge.
Params.r: The area on the image to duplicate.

Documentation.Summary: Duplicate the entire image and re-draw it at given coordinates.

Params.x: Position to re-draw the duplicated image at on the X axis, from the left edge.
Params.y: Position to re-draw the duplicated image at on the Y axis, from the top edge.

Documentation.Summary:
Returns a new pixel map that contains resized version of this image with given dimensions.
Will try to preserve aspect ratio.
Copy from a bitmap

Returns the raw bytes of a PNG file that contains this pixel maps image.
Internally writes and deletes a file, so be careful using it often.
Save the pixel map as a PNG file at given location.
Documentation.Return: Whether the file was created or not.

Params.filename: A full, valid absolute target path. Will not create directories on its own.

Documentation.Summary: Save the pixel map as a JPEG file at given location.
Documentation.Return: Whether the file was created or not.

Params.filename: A full, valid absolute target path. Will not create directories on its own.

Documentation.Summary:
Returns the raw bytes of a JPEG file that contains this pixel maps image.
Internally writes and deletes a file, so be careful using it often.

Returns the raw bytes of a BMP file that contains this pixel maps image.
Internally writes and deletes a file, so be careful using it often.
Width of the pixel map.
Height of the pixel map.
Whether this pixel map supports the alpha channel.
THe size of this pixel map.
A pixel map, or just a simple image.
